Off Calendar Sep-27-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A.'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT AND DISMISS THIS ACTION WITH PREJUDICE is Granted. No opposition filed. Order to be signed. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185. =(302/LCN)
